instruction: Use Skill(dev-tools:next-tasks) to pick and drive the next task through the full code cycle. Do NOT inline-pick or inline-implement.
Use Skill(skill-dev-orchestrator) to orchestrate the implementation. Do NOT inline-implement.
Use Skill(dev-tools:dev-review-cycle) to run the review cycle. Do NOT inline-manage review.

pattern: (orchestrate|fan out|fan-out|parallel agents|split.*across agents|delegate this|write a workflow|run a workflow|병렬.*에이전트|에이전트.*팬아웃)
instruction: Use Skill(dev-tools:orchestrate) for the delegation decision (single agent vs fan-out vs Workflow).
Use Skill(dev-tools:harness-init) to bootstrap or validate repo agent infrastructure.
Use Skill(dev-tools:harness-curator) for cross-session transcript analysis.
Spawn Agent(subagent_type=explorer) before editing — first-touch discovery rule.
Spawn Agent(subagent_type=skill-evaluator) for skill quality assessment.
Use Skill(dev-tools:loop-engineer) for iterative quality improvement without a test gate.
Use Skill(productivity:persona-debate) to simulate a debate among synthetic Korean personas.
skip_if_prompt_matches: (\.csv|survey|설문|여론조사 결과|보도자료|회의록|녹취|챗봇|autogen|오케스트레이션 코드|코드 짜|소설|등장인물|마케팅 전략 문서|감성분석|주제.*추천|추천해줘|자료.*찾아|자료.*정리|통계 자료)

instruction: Use Skill(productivity:hwpx) for Korean Hancom (HWPX) document tasks.
